title: Revalidate stale Live Register candidates
goal: Compare old candidate observations with current Registry, PR and runtime evidence so resolved work does not remain operationally open forever.

acceptance.assertion: Revalidation uses candidate identity and supersession history, including legacy events.
Current task, PR, merge and runtime evidence is checked before proposing close, supersede or promote.
Candidate status changes are explicit reviewed events and never automatic task verification.
The report exposes age and revalidation due state without automatic deletion.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
